Details ](#description)

The biggest advantage of Q²M WaterSpot is its safety on paintwork. Due to inappropriate maintenance, water spots may become an issue on fresh coatings. You can remove the most undesirable defects by using O²M WaterSpot without the need to polish and, in most cases, re-apply the quartz coat.


### EASY & EFFECTIVE

Q²M WaterSpot is very easy to use. Before applying, clean the bodywork with a gentle, pH neutral high-quality shampoo and dry the surface. Then spray directly onto the paint or on a microfiber cloth and wipe the area affected with water spots. If there is strong staining, spray generously directly onto the surface and wipe the surface a few times with a microfiber. Repeat if required.


## Best practice and pro-tips from Yves Heylen

Work panel by panel. Never spray on a large area at once, as the product might dry. Use a soft microfibre and wipe the affected area multiple time. If necessary - repeat the process. TIP: Never leave a towel soaked with the product on the surface, especially glass.

Consumption: 15ml/panel
COATING SAFE: DEPENDING ON COATING
PH NEUTRAL: NO
BODYWORK SAFE: YES

Delivery Information ](#deliveryinfo)

At Blok 51 we take great pride in the speed of our dispatch and delivery times.  We try our best to dispatch your orders the same day you order where possible.  To ensure the best chance of your item being dispatched the same day we advise getting your order to us before 12pm (noon).  We also offer a selection of shipping options to ensure you get the service you need.

You can even collect your order from the Blok 51 shop if you like.  Just select ‘Collect In Store’ at the shipping options and we’ll contact you as soon as your order is ready.

To get free standard delivery within the UK all you have to do is spend over £75 and you automatically qualify.

All deliveries are tracked meaning you won’t have to worry about your parcel going missing.

The vast majority of our deliveries to the UK and Ireland only take 1-2 days so you don’t have to wait too long to get your hands on all your favourite detailing and valeting products.
